item.title: Hell yes, duckduckgo gives power to block AI images
item.description: https://www.knowyourmobile.com/data-privacy/duckduckgo-now-lets-you-hide-ai-generated-images-from-search-results/ DuckDuckGo Now Lets You Hide AI-Generated Images From Search Results Ever wished you could skip all the AI-generated “slop” cluttering up image search results? Google is all-in on AI and everything that comes with it, including AI generated everything. DuckDuckGo does things differently. It lets you turn off its AI overviews feature, for instance, unlike Google, and now DuckDuckGo has quietly rolled out a feature that lets you filter out AI generated images. Why DuckDuckGo’s New Filter Matters AI-generated images have exploded across the web thanks to services like Midjourney and DALL·E. Whether you’re searching for art, products, or memes, it’s getting harder to tell what’s human-made versus AI-generated. DuckDuckGo’s new setting—called Hide AI-Generated Images—gives you a simple way to filter these out of your search results. You won’t find this in most other search engines right now, including Google and Bing. How To Enable DuckDuckGo’s AI Image Filter There are two main ways to access this feature: 1. From DuckDuckGo’s Main Settings: Go to: duckduckgo.com/settings#aifeatures Look for Hide AI-Generated Images Toggle it on While you’re there, you can also disable Duck.ai and AI summaries if you prefer a more stripped-back search experience. 2. Using The NoAI Subdomain Visit: noai.duckduckgo.com This version of DuckDuckGo has AI image filtering and AI-assisted summaries automatically disabled. No need to tweak settings manually. Pro Tip: If you’re using privacy-focused browsers like Brave or Firefox, you can combine DuckDuckGo’s setting with custom blocklists such as uBlock Origin’s Huge AI Blocklist on GitHub for even stronger filtering. Does It Actually Work? Short answer: Mostly, yes. The filter isn’t perfect. Some AI-generated content might still slip through, but it significantly reduces clutter. For now, it’s not yet available directly inside the DuckDuckGo browser app, though we’d expect that to change with a future update. If you want more control, browser extensions like uBlock Origin and uBlacklist let you manually block AI image sites using community-maintained lists. Why This Is A Smart Move By DuckDuckGo As more people look for cleaner, more private web experiences, features like this set DuckDuckGo apart from mainstream search engines. It echoes why many users—including us—prefer DuckDuckGo, Brave, or even Bing over Google these days: Less clutter More control Stronger focus on privacy FAQ: DuckDuckGo AI Image Filter Does this work in the DuckDuckGo browser app? Not yet. The feature is only on the web version as of now. Can I block AI images completely? Not fully, but combining DuckDuckGo’s filter with browser extensions like uBlock Origin helps. Is this feature available on mobile? Yes—if you access DuckDuckGo via your mobile browser and adjust the settings. Why block AI-generated images at all? Most people prefer seeing real photography or human-created content rather than algorithm-generated visuals.

item.title: ICE BUDGET - 1 BILLION IN BONUSES
item.description: Not only is the ICE budget larger than the US Army's, it also contains nearly 1 billion dollars in bonuses for its agents. The 858 million is enough for each ice agent to receive a $42,000 bonus. The average annual Christmas bonus is $2,500. I think the largest Christmas bonus I've ever gotten is $200, LOL. Seems weird that Doge isn't trying to cut this wasteful spending. It's clear that Trump wants Big brother looking over our shoulder. Electronic cleansing is MAGA's number one priority. https://youtube.com/shorts/oEHOgNHCR8g?si=sk3CNRYudDC4K4pt

item.title: Cake Day Cat Dump (mostly Void, with Cat Tax)
item.description:
Which is totally true. Just three nights ago, we had turned off the lights, and then heard a repetitive "clink" coming from somewhere else in the house. My husband said, "He's just playing with something." I listened and said No. Sure enough, our male cat was on the counter, rhythmically licking the pan we had cooked sausages in, and hadn't washed yet.
This has absolutely happened to me.
And a Cat Tax — Our void Rona (short for "Corona" as we got her in the pandemic). Our grey cat's name is "Covie", short for... you guessed it! LOL
He always has stuff to say ;-)
item.dc:creator: hotforbagels

item.title: The Quack Family Stands With PBS
item.description: PBS was a huge part of my childhood from Mr. Rogers, Ghostwriter, Reading Rainbow, Sesame Street, Wishbone, and so much more. It taught me how to be kind, compassionate, love animals, and overall, how to be a better person. So yes, it is a crime that this beloved resource is under attack in the US. A lot of PBS funding comes from us, the US viewers, but rural and low-income communities rely heavily on public funding to keep these stations alive (Like here in Alabama). Cutting that support isn’t just budget trimming. It’s silencing them. If you’d like to help PBS keep going, you can donate here: https://foundation.pbs.org/ The Quack Family regularly donates to our local PBS, and I personally know some of the wonderful people who work on Sesame Street and at NPR. They do it for the love of a better tomorrow, not for financial gain. And, as Mr. Rogers once said "Look for the helpers." #IStandWithPBS #DefundedNotDefeated #SavePBS #SaveSesameStreet
item.dc:creator: QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer

item.title: Unhinged, Unrelated, Dumperoony: Continued 19
item.description:
Lmao rofl
Imagine getting high and that table stalking you around the house. Imagine it being able to climb stairs. And open doors with its opposable thumbs. Oh, it's got hands. Hidden away. Nimble, deadly, quick little hands. Sweet dreams, LNI.
Well, when I say close, I mean....
Nice.
(record scratch) that's me, the coconut. I bet you're wondering how fast I'm flying.
The universe is vast and wonderous indeed.
I don't go much for Musk but this was a good result in anyone's book.

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
TheFreePizzaDude is back ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／ If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
This has been such a huge help for us to feed more people and we love you so much https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 7pm central
Puckett is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
15,656 meals since we started 1,131 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 120 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 215 5th by Pizza Angel @ScooterMcScoots 220 6th, 7th, 8th and 9th by @OP 315 10th and 11th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 330 12th by Pizza Angel @HelaSisterOfThor 400 13th and 14th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 425 15th and 16th by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 445 17th by Pizza Angel @Spoonassassin 500 18th, 19th, 20th and 21st by @OP 545 22nd and Michael Jordan by Pizza Angel @jaenen 610 Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @Spoonassassin 620 25th by Pizza Angel @Omnislash9 640 26th and 27th by Pizza Angel @Spoonassassin 700 28th and 29th by Pizza Angel @ILoveMadKate 700 30th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 700 31st and 32nd by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams ... Today's Grocery Tally 500 1st by Grocery Angel @Spoonassassin 520 2nd by Grocery Angel @StabbyTheCat 700 3rd by Grocery Angel @ILoveMadKate ... Alright everyone that's it for OP Today we sent out 32 meals Filled 3 huge grocery orders That's 15,688 meals since we started 1,134 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1417 (cannibal research)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. Imgur ate a lot of text of course. Whatever. We try again.
This makes a lot of sense if you consider the origins of both religions: Abraham argues and bargains a great deal with YHWH versus Muhammad is told directly what to do: "Recite!"
He has some egrets.
Love it when someone makes a spicy meme in my comments section.
One of the main tenants of Eastern Orthodox theology can be summed up as "God became human so humanity can become more godly," but we all know that wouldn't fly for this woman. Hell, she'd probably not consider me a Christian anyway, because I believe in following the Beatitudes and have pretty pictures of Jesus on my walls.
I have yet to find a fossil ammonite.
Some days it feels this way.
This is.... this is a very unique example of Batisian Mimicry if true. But I think anyone who has seen more than one pair of boobs would say this is bullshit. Points for creativity and a reason that's not necessarily born out of misogyny, though.
Fire, arguably, has been humanity's oldest friend.
As a result of being enslaved to a city and landscape that requires vehicles, I now have a new car: my parents sold me their Santa Fe, since mom has trouble getting into it; they acquired a new car in its place.
I want to wear the floppy Gaulic helmet.
They're gonna attach nacelles to these in the Star Trek future to keep them going.
The end days of the Permian got really hot.
Maybe that's what I've been doing wrong.
Ron's response is also mine whenever missionaries come to my door.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too! Peekaboo! Peekaboo! Peekaboo! Whatchoo talking about [undecipherable babble] whatdoing good boy fuck you. Glory pippin! Glory!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
